text.title: GitLab Issue Boards Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply GitLab Issue Boards end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: design-label-taxonomy
step.decision-gate: If status states < 3, reject as too coarse.

step.name: set-milestone-cadence
step.action: Pick cadence; create active milestones programmatically.

step.name: wire-board-lists
step.action: Create board lists, one per status state, in order.
step.decision-gate: If any list name doesn't match label value semantically, fix.

step.name: issue-project-token
step.action: Issue project-scoped token with api + read_repository minimum; expiry ≤90d.
step.decision-gate: If sudo/admin in scope list, REJECT.

step.name: validate-and-apply
step.action: Run validator. Apply via GitLab API. Test with one round-trip issue.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix before apply.
